scenario: Meeting Efficiency: Parking Lot / Tabling Topics 🅿️
text: When a conversation goes off-track, you can say: "In the interest of time, let's {{c1::park this topic}} and {{c2::circle back to it}} at the end of the meeting."
explanation: In the interest of time means to save time. **Park a topic** (or put it in the 'parking lot') means to temporarily postpone discussing it. **Circle back** means to return to a topic later.
usage:
Pattern: In the interest of time, let's park [topic] and circle back to it [time]
  • In the interest of time, let's park the budget discussion and circle back to it on Friday.
  • I want to circle back to what you said about API keys.
spanish: Cuando una conversación se desvía, puedes decir: "Por razones de tiempo, guardemos este tema en el tintero y volvamos a él al final de la reunión".

text: If a detailed discussion only concerns a few people: "This seems to require a deeper dive, so let's {{c1::take this offline}} and let the rest of the team {{c2::get some time back}}."
explanation: Take this offline is an idiom meaning to discuss a topic privately outside of the current meeting. **Get some time back** is a polite way to end a meeting early or release people who are not needed.
usage:
Pattern: take this offline / get [amount of] time back
  • Let's take the database schema discussion offline.
  • If we finish early, everyone gets 10 minutes back.
spanish: Si una discusión detallada solo concierne a unas pocas personas: "Esto parece requerir un análisis más profundo, así que hablemos de esto fuera de línea y dejemos que el resto del equipo recupere algo de tiempo".

text: Let's {{c1::keep this discussion high-level}} today, as we only have 15 minutes left on the agenda.
explanation: Keep high-level means to focus on the big picture, summaries, and general strategies rather than getting caught up in minor details or technicalities.
usage:
Pattern: keep this [discussion/sync] high-level
  • Let's keep this sync high-level and discuss implementation next week.
  • She kept the presentation high-level for the executives.
spanish: Para evitar empantanarse en los detalles: "Mantengamos esta discusión a un nivel general hoy, ya que solo nos quedan 15 minutos en la agenda".

text: I want to make sure we {{c1::stick to the agenda}} so we can {{c2::cover all the items}} we planned for today.
explanation: Stick to the agenda means to follow the pre-planned list of topics. **Cover items** means to discuss and resolve the topics.
usage:
Pattern: stick to the agenda / cover the items
  • If we stick to the agenda, we will finish on time.
  • We have a lot of items to cover in today's standup.
spanish: Quiero asegurarme de que nos apeguemos a la agenda para que podamos cubrir todos los temas que planeamos para hoy.
